title: Vanilla like
description: Improves minecraft without changeing the feel of the game
body:
these are all the mods I use on my youtube channel in my survival world. This modpack has a combomation of many types of mods like quality of life mods such as do a barrel roll. also survival utility mods such as litematica. Also i have optomized the heck out of this so it can run on anything with voxy to have long generation of chunks. all the mods are compatible (Yes i am positive). These mods just make the game better in what i think is a large improvement over vanilla but still feeling not too modded like being able to have an insane render distence and still haveing playable FPS also makeing it more fun like Gamma Utilities and Do a barrel roll.
subscribe to my channel here: https://www.youtube.com/@rockninja32


![Do a barrel roll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b017de63476d4d4fdfc5a28daafc519d1f7c98.png)
